assertions.assertion: Response explains that third-party authentication handlers need NuGet package updates for the new .NET version
assertions.rationale: Opening states 'existing authentication handlers will need NuGet package updates when upgrading to .NET 8+'.

assertions.assertion: Response specifically mentions WS-Federation handler needing an update
assertions.rationale: Dedicated section on WS-Federation with Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authentication.WsFederation package update.

assertions.assertion: Response mentions SAML2P handler (Sustainsys.Saml2 or equivalent) needing a compatible version for .NET 8+
assertions.rationale: Dedicated section on Sustainsys.Saml2 needing a .NET 8+ compatible version.

assertions.assertion: Response recommends testing all external login flows end-to-end after migration
assertions.rationale: Bold statement: 'Test all external login flows end-to-end after migration' with 4 specific test scenarios.
